subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness in His Books and Scriptures unto Him Who came with the Truth, through Whose Name the world was illumined and the faces of nations were darkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله فی کتبه و صحفه لمن اتی بالحق باسم انار به العالم و اسودت وجوه الامم
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @empty learning; false spirituality, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
